model_scope: K group round 2 quantitative match predictions
scope: K组第二轮葡萄牙vs乌兹别克斯坦、哥伦比亚vs刚果金量化预测；不进入出线预测，不给投注建议。

input_readiness.label: partial_source_limited
available_inputs: K group round 2 data refresh packet with partial_source_limited status
Portugal/Uzbekistan/Colombia/DR Congo roster and player_state files
postmatch state sync audit confirming K group round 2 fixtures
missing_or_stale_inputs: K group tactical refresh packet remains tactical_refresh_partial
complete official cards/technical stats for Uzbekistan-Colombia remains partial locally

round2_matches: 葡萄牙 vs 乌兹别克斯坦
哥伦比亚 vs 刚果金
fixture_confirmation.date_policy: local audit lists K group round 2 as scheduled 2026-06-23; filenames use 2026-06-23

method.summary: Partial-current quant model using the K group round 2 data refresh packet, local team strength, first-round postmatch player_state, tactical priors and Poisson score matrix. Market fields are null because no official/live same-source odds snapshot is available.
method.double_counting_guard: Round-one results are reflected through player_state and form adjustment once; odds snippets from round one are not reused as live round-two market truth.

baseline_strength.notes: Portugal retain much higher squad strength, but round-one 1-1 vs DR Congo lowers conversion confidence.

recent_round1_form.notes: Portugal drew 1-1 after early lead; Uzbekistan lost 1-3 but Fayzullaev/Shomurodov path worked.

player_state.portugal: Avg form 2.81; Joao Neves 4.0, Pedro Neto 3.5; Ronaldo 2.5 and Ruben Dias availability conflict noted.
player_state.uzbekistan: Avg form 2.27; Fayzullaev 4.0, Shomurodov/Fayzullaev second-half route positive; Yusupov error and back line pressure negative.

availability_and_injury.portugal: Ruben Dias status conflicting in local review; Ronaldo minutes/role and attacking rotation need T-75m confirmation.
availability_and_injury.uzbekistan: Khusanov yellow and defensive workload noted; official lineup and full card list still missing.

schedule_environment.portugal: Same Houston venue after round one; lowest travel burden. Houston heat/humidity risk is moderated by NRG roof but still affects training and commute.
schedule_environment.uzbekistan: Mexico City to Houston transfer after round one; travel and acclimation create a small negative adjustment.

tactical_matchup.portugal: Width, half-space creators and set pieces should create territorial edge.
tactical_matchup.uzbekistan: Likely 3-4-3/5-4-1 block, counter through Shomurodov/Fayzullaev, better after halftime adjustments.

market_signal.model_policy: market_adjustment set to 0.00; no executable betting language

matches.market_comparison_note: No official Chinese sports lottery odds or same-source live 1X2/handicap/totals snapshot is available in local inputs; odds calibration is withheld.
quality_notes: Partial model because data refresh is source-limited and tactical refresh is tactical_refresh_partial.
Portugal are favored, but round-one 1-1 limits blowout confidence.
Uzbekistan's first goal route through Fayzullaev/Shomurodov keeps draw and 1-goal tail visible.

sensitivity.impact: Portugal xG can move +/-0.15 depending on striker/creator plan.
If Portugal center-back stability is weaker, Uzbekistan scoring tail rises.
Deep 5-4-1 raises under/draw; more aggressive chase raises Portugal transition goals.

baseline_strength.notes: Colombia have higher technical and wide-attacking quality; DR Congo proved high-resilience upset path vs Portugal.

recent_round1_form.notes: Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1; DR Congo drew Portugal 1-1 with Wissa set-piece route.

player_state.colombia: Avg form 3.22; Luis Diaz 4.9, Munoz 4.4, Campaz 4.2; broad positive postmatch state.
player_state.dr_congo: Avg form 2.69; Wissa 4.0, Tuanzebe/Mbemba/Wan-Bissaka positive; set-piece and transition confidence up.

availability_and_injury.colombia: James/Luis Diaz/Duran roles still need T-75m confirmation; no live official lineup.
availability_and_injury.dr_congo: Wissa/Bakambu/Mbemba roles need T-75m confirmation; full card/injury list missing.

schedule_environment.colombia: Mexico City to Guadalajara short transfer; altitude context known but official hourly stadium weather missing.
schedule_environment.dr_congo: Houston to Guadalajara cross-border transfer plus altitude adjustment create a small recovery concern.

tactical_matchup.colombia: Wide threat, James service, Luis Diaz carry and late Campaz option.
tactical_matchup.dr_congo: Compact defense, direct counters, set-piece second balls, physical duel edge in moments.

market_signal.model_policy: market_adjustment set to 0.00; no executable betting language

matches.market_comparison_note: No official Chinese sports lottery odds or same-source live 1X2/handicap/totals snapshot is available in local inputs; odds calibration is withheld.
quality_notes: Partial model because data refresh is source-limited and tactical refresh is tactical_refresh_partial.
Colombia are first direction, but DR Congo's Portugal draw materially raises draw/underdog tail.
1-1 is the single most likely scoreline even though Colombia lead aggregate win probability.

sensitivity.impact: If both start without restrictions, Colombia xG can rise by 0.10-0.18.
If Wissa/Mbemba/Bakambu roles are intact, DR Congo scoring tail remains near or above 1.0 xG.
Early Colombia goal can open 2-0/2-1 paths; slow start keeps 1-1 and 0-1 live.

aggregate_quality_notes: K group data refresh is partial_source_limited and tactical refresh is tactical_refresh_partial; this is not a complete live prediction.
Odds fields are null because official Chinese sports lottery odds and same-source live odds/handicap/totals are missing.
All outputs are probability discussion only and marked discussion_only_hold.
